description: Quick plots for inspecting MS data and results: a single MS spectrum (stick plot) by index or RT, a total ion chromatogram, a 2D feature map (RT vs m/z), or a 2D heatmap of MS1 signal.
rules: INDEX/RT select the spectrum for the 'spectrum' plot
usage: Set KIND and INPUT. Optional INDEX (spectrum index) or RT (nearest RT) for KIND=spectrum. Output: plot.png.
limitation: Requires pyOpenMS 3.5.0 + matplotlib + numpy (Python 3.9+) to produce a real image; if absent the porter still creates plot.png and records the reason.
